subject: ee
name_zh: IB DP · 拓展论文 EE
description: EE is an independent 4000-word research paper in a chosen subject. Includes Research Question, sources, analysis, reflection (RPPF).

domains.name: 研究设计 / Research Design / Research Design

nodes.name: 选题与学科
curriculum_points: Students will be able to select an appropriate Diploma Programme subject for their Extended Essay, ensuring it aligns with their academic interests and the subject's availability within the IB framework.
Students will justify their subject choice by demonstrating a clear understanding of the subject's disciplinary conventions and its suitability for a 4000-word independent investigation.

nodes.name: 研究问题（RQ）
curriculum_points: Students will formulate a clear, focused, and arguable research question that is appropriate for an in-depth, 4000-word academic investigation within their chosen subject.
Students will refine their initial research question through preliminary reading to ensure it is manageable, specific, and conducive to critical analysis and argument.

nodes.name: 研究方法
curriculum_points: Students will design and justify a coherent research methodology appropriate to their subject and research question, demonstrating an understanding of primary and/or secondary research methods.
Students will apply their chosen methodology systematically, explaining its application and acknowledging any limitations in their research process.

nodes.name: 文献综述
curriculum_points: Students will conduct a comprehensive review of relevant scholarly literature, situating their research question within the existing academic discourse of the field.
Students will synthesize and critically evaluate the literature, identifying gaps, debates, or contexts that their own investigation will address.

domains.name: 写作阶段 / Writing Process / Writing Process

nodes.name: 大纲与结构
curriculum_points: Students will construct a logical and coherent outline for their essay, ensuring the structure effectively supports the development of their argument and analysis.
Students will organize their essay according to the formal conventions of academic writing in their subject area, including a clear introduction, development, and conclusion.

nodes.name: 论证与分析
curriculum_points: Students will develop a sustained, reasoned argument in response to their research question, supported by critical analysis of evidence.
Students will demonstrate higher-order thinking skills by evaluating different perspectives, interpreting data or sources, and drawing well-substantiated conclusions.

nodes.name: 引用规范（MLA/APA）
curriculum_points: Students will consistently and accurately apply a recognized system of academic referencing (e.g., MLA, APA, Chicago) to acknowledge all sources used in their work.
Students will understand and avoid academic misconduct by distinguishing between their own ideas and those of others through proper paraphrasing, quoting, and citation.

nodes.name: 格式规范
curriculum_points: Students will adhere to the formal presentation requirements for the Extended Essay, including title page, abstract, contents page, page numbering, and overall layout as specified in the EE guide.
Students will ensure their final submission is professionally presented and meets the technical requirements for assessment.

domains.name: 反思与面谈 / Reflection & RPPF / Reflection & RPPF

nodes.name: 初次反思
curriculum_points: Students will complete the first reflection session on the Reflections on planning and progress form (RPPF), reflecting on their initial ideas, the formulation of their research question, and their planning process.

nodes.name: 中期反思
curriculum_points: Students will complete the interim reflection on the RPPF, evaluating the progress of their research and writing, discussing challenges encountered, and outlining their plan for completion.

nodes.name: 终审面谈
curriculum_points: Following the completion of the Extended Essay, students will participate in a concluding interview (viva voce) with their supervisor to reflect on their learning journey, the research process, and the outcomes of their work.

nodes.name: RPPF 反思表
curriculum_points: Students will complete all three mandatory reflections on the official RPPF, using the form to document their engagement with the research process and their intellectual and personal development.

domains.name: 学科差异 / Subject-Specific Tips / Subject-Specific

nodes.name: 理科 EE 要点
curriculum_points: Students undertaking a Science EE will design and conduct a safe and ethically sound investigation, collecting and processing primary or secondary data to explore a specific scientific question.
Students will analyze their results using appropriate scientific methods and techniques, discussing their significance in relation to established scientific theory and the research question.

nodes.name: 文科 EE 要点
curriculum_points: Students undertaking a Humanities EE (e.g., History, Economics, Psychology) will construct a critical argument based on the systematic analysis and evaluation of primary and secondary sources.
Students will demonstrate an understanding of the theoretical frameworks and historiographical or disciplinary debates relevant to their chosen topic.

nodes.name: 数学 EE 要点
curriculum_points: Students undertaking a Mathematics EE will engage in the exploration of a specific mathematical topic, demonstrating rigorous and precise mathematical reasoning and communication.
The essay may involve applying mathematics to solve a problem, proving theorems, or analyzing mathematical models, with a clear emphasis on the beauty and utility of mathematics itself.

nodes.name: 世界研究 EE
curriculum_points: Students undertaking a World Studies EE will formulate a research question of contemporary global significance that examines an issue through the lens of at least two IB disciplines.
Students will integrate concepts, theories, and methods from their chosen disciplines to construct a coherent interdisciplinary analysis of the complex global issue.
